case_title: HAWTHORNE/STONE REAL ESTATE INVESTMENTS, INC. VS. JULIA DUNN et al

docket_entries.description: NOTICE TO DEFENDANTS
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT DUNN, JULIA
NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL
FEES NOT PAID. FILINGS OF JULIA DUNN ARE STRICKEN. NOTICE SENT TO PARTIES.

APPLICATION PENDING FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY DEFENDANT DUNN, JULIA HEARING SET FOR NOV-17-2010 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HAWTHORNE/STONE REAL ESTATE INVESTMENTS, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DUNN, JULIA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 691 POST STREET, #501, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94109. $3,870.90 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,870.90, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE SCANNED DOC

MASTER CALENDAR MOTION ON NOV-17-2010 IN DEPT. 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT JULIA DUNN'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. NO APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT DENIES THE APPLICATION IN WHOLE. ORDER SIGNED, AND ENDORSED-FILED COPY MAILED TO APPLICANT. JUDGE: JAMES J. MCBRIDE; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)

MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON NOV-17-2010 IN 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT JULIA DUNN'S WAIVER OF ADDITIONAL COURT FEES AND COSTS. NO APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT DENIES THE APPLICATION AS TO JURY FEES AND EXPENSES AND COURT REPORTERS' FEES. ORDER SIGNED, AND ENDORSED-FILED COPY MAILED TO APPLICANT. JUDGE: JAMES J. MCBRIDE; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
REQUEST TO SET CASE FOR COURT TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF HAWTHORNE/STONE REAL ESTATE INVESTMENTS, INC. COURT TRIAL SET FOR NOV-01-2010 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206

MASTER JURY CALENDAR OF NOV-08-2010 ASSIGNED TO SHORT CAUSE TRIAL CALENDAR ON NOV-08-2010 AT 10:45 AM IN DEPT. 218, EVERETT HEWLETT FOR DEFAULT PROVE-UP HEARING. JULIAN LASTOWSKI APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFF. NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. MR. LASTOWSKI REPRESENTED TO THE COURT THAT THE DEFENDANT, JULIA DUNN, DID NOT VACATE THE BUILDING. JUDGE: JAMES J. MCBRIDE; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
SHORT CAUSE TRIAL ON NOV-08-2010 OFF CALENDAR - JUDGMENT ENTERED. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY LOIS JONES, CSR #3689.
